headline: Qi Wireless Chargers with Integrated Fans Are Surprisingly Effective
summary: Wireless Qi chargers with integrated fans are surprisingly effective. Initial skepticism about noise and gimmickry was overcome. The Kuxiu D5 Qi2.2 dock offers active cooling, converting users.

headline: Amazon updated 2023’s Fire HD 10 tablet with 4GB of RAM
summary: Amazon quietly updated its 2023 Fire HD 10 tablet. The 32GB version now ships with 4GB of RAM, up from 3GB. This boosts performance for the budget-friendly tablet.

headline: World Cup spectators may be under federal surveillance
summary: US co-hosting the World Cup brings increased surveillance. Spectators and city residents may be unknowingly monitored. Drones and cameras are used in host cities like Kansas City.

headline: Godox C100: Slim camera with transparent LCD viewfinder
summary: Standalone point-and-shoot cameras are experiencing a resurgence. Godox joins the trend with its new C100 digital camera. It features a unique transparent LCD screen for its viewfinder.

headline: Mr. Terrific TV Show in the Works With Pilot from The Sandman Alum
summary: DC Studios is reportedly developing a Mr. Terrific TV show. The series will spin off from the Superman character. A pilot is in the works with an alum from The Sandman.

headline: Supergirl Faced Creative Differences Between DC Studios and Craig Gillespie
summary: DC Studios and director Craig Gillespie had creative differences for Supergirl. This led to testing competing cuts of the film. The disagreement occurred months before the film's release.

headline: Danganronpa 2x2 Delayed to Early 2027
summary: Spike Chunsoft has announced a significant delay. Danganronpa 2x2 is now pushed back to early 2027. Fans will have to wait longer for the anticipated title.

headline: Heat 2 Reportedly Casts Leonardo DiCaprio and Christian Bale
summary: Leonardo DiCaprio and Christian Bale are reportedly cast in Heat 2. They will play Chris Shiherlis and Vincent Hanna, respectively. Filming for the sequel is planned for November 2026.

headline: Starmer reveals 'intensely personal' decision to quit as PM
summary: Outgoing PM Starmer shared his "really tough" decision to resign. He conducted his first interview since stepping down. Starmer also issued a warning to Burnham.

headline: Pubs and police prepare for 1am England-Mexico World Cup kick-off
summary: England's World Cup match against Mexico will kick off at 1am. Pubs can stay open until 5am following a FIFA U-turn. Police and venues are bracing for a challenging early morning.

headline: Taylor Swift marries Travis Kelce in NYC
summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce tied the knot in New York City. Adam Sandler officiated the star-studded ceremony. Midtown Manhattan streets were shut down for the event.

headline: In pictures: Stars and fans celebrate Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding
summary: Celebrities and sports stars attended the A-list wedding. Fans gathered as Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married. The New York ceremony was a major event.
